title: Liminal Shader
description: A dreamcore/dream liminal shader with many presets to choose from
body:
A lightweight atmospheric shader focused on soft lighting, liminal visuals, and immersive ambience. Designed to give Minecraft a strange, dreamlike feeling while keeping performance smooth on lower-end PCs.

Features:


Soft ambient lighting


Atmospheric fog

Many presets to choose from

Calm color grading


Enhanced night mood


Lightweight performance


Optimized for Iris


Perfect for:


Backrooms builds


Liminal spaces


Exploration


Atmospheric screenshots

Compatibility:


Iris Shader Loader


Minecraft 1.20.1


Status
Currently in active development. More visual improvements and features will be added in future updates.
